known_critical_findings_in_flight: Agent 39 root-caused 2nd PR #19 regression: init.sh non-interactive maps POC_MODE=GOV_MODE unconditionally (line 3217). For --gov-mode production, this writes poc_mode='production' instead of '' (interactive correctly clears it at init.sh:381). Effect: process-checklist.sh:540 start_phase4 blocks Phase 4 for all production deployments. Affects all 12 production base agents + production-upgrade agents at Phase 4. Continuing sweep; triage will dedupe.
runbook_fix_log: Section A originally specified --git-host github (default) which causes init.sh to invoke real gh CLI and create real private repos uat-agent-N. Agents 1, 2, 3 (re-runs) created repos before fix landed (private, single chore commit). Runbook updated 2026-04-26 to use --git-host other + https://example.com/fake.git + --branch-protection-attested. Agents 4-84 will follow fixed runbook.
